question: On Windows 10/11, what is the simplest reliable mechanism for a Node.js plugin process to query the currently-playing song title and artist when Apple Music for Windows (Microsoft Store version) is the playback source? The mechanism must be invokable as a child process from Node (spawning a helper that returns title+artist on stdout, or similar), produce parseable output, work without elevated privileges, and ideally have zero install footprint beyond what the .sdPlugin bundle can carry.
constraints: Must preserve the C-S4-S5 contract: getNowPlaying() returns {title, artist} or null; never rejects.
Must be invokable from Node.js (the plugin process is Node).
No admin privileges, no driver install, no antivirus-triggering operations.
Should work whether Apple Music is the active session or not (if Apple Music is the foreground media session, return its track; if nothing is playing, return null).
Bundle size budget: the music source helper should ideally fit in the .sdPlugin folder without external installer.
